ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Bolognese Sauce (73%) [Australian Beef (26%), Water, Crushed Tomato (Tomato Juice, Citric Acid (330), Firming Agent (509)), Onion, Tomato Paste, Carrot, Celery, Red Wine (Egg, Milk), Thickener (1422), Sugar, Salt, Garlic, Yeast Extract, Herbs, Spice, Malt Powder (Wheat)], Cooked Red Lentil Pasta (26%) [Cooked Pasta, Water], Parmesan Cheese (1%) (Milk).
product_name: Beef Bolognese with Red Lentil Fusilli
